title: October 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 25''' is the 298th day of the year (299th in leap years), with 67 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Peter Dennis]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Collette Bennett Sunderman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[John Gregory Betancourt]] is born.
*1963 – [[Lisa Fuson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Kevin Michael Richardson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Jonathan Dixon]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Cecil Castellucci]] is born.
*1969 – [[Nika Futterman]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 38|''Star Wars Weekly'' 38]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Christopher Sean]] is born.
*[[1986]] – "[[Hard Sell]]" and "[[A Warrior and a Lurdo]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Republic 23: Infinity's End, Part 1'']] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Anne Gerety]] dies.
*[[2005]] – ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]] published.
*2006 – ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Six: In the Shadows of Their Fathers]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Purgatory]]'' released.
*[[2011]] – [[Riptide (novel)|''Riptide'']] released.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 129|''Star Wars Insider'' 129]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Insider 169|''Star Wars Insider'' 169]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu 3|''Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu'' 3]] published.
*2017 – [[John Mollo]] dies.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 37|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 37]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Everyday]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 4 — Crimson Reign]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 4 — Crimson Reign]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 214|''Star Wars Insider'' 214]] published.
*2022 – "[[Porgs (Galactic Pals)|Porgs]]" and "[[Ortolan (episode)|Ortolan]]" premiere on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids: D-Squad 2|''Dark Droids: D-Squad'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 37|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 37]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Manga|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian'']] manga adaptation ended serialization in Japan.
<noinclude>
